query: What version is my EKS cluster prod-use1 running right now?

Am I using Karpenter or managed node groups on the platform cluster?

Document the networking and security posture of our dev cluster for the new platform engineer starting Monday.
Before I touch anything, walk me through what's deployed in the cluster and how CI/CD gets things there.

Is it a better practice to run my ingress controller on Fargate or on Karpenter-managed nodes?

Explain how Kubernetes StatefulSet rolling updates work at the controller level.

Run an operational excellence audit on my cluster and rate each area GREEN, AMBER, or RED.

Catalog our services in a Backstage developer portal so app teams can see what's deployed and self-serve new ones.
